training_status: lifting 3x per week, cardio 1-2x per week (walking and HIIT for 30 minutes)

benefits.description: Lost 6.5 kg body weight with 0.8 kg muscle loss over 10 weeks 5 days. Body fat percentage decreased from 24.2% to 18.4% (5.8% reduction, approximately 0.5% per week). Waist size decreased from 30 inches to 28 inches. Visible abs becoming apparent.
Visceral fat reported as very low according to multiple InBody scans. Noticeably leaner facial appearance.

side_effects.description: Bowel movements not so good but tolerable

protocol_notes: Prior use of Tirzepatide resulted in 6 kg weight loss (74 kg to 68 kg) with reported fatigue. Retatrutide protocol: 2 mg weekly for 4 weeks, then 2.5 mg weekly for 4 weeks, then increased to 5 mg weekly where fat loss accelerated. SLU-PP-332 used a few times but discontinued due to unrelated medication. CJC DAC used for 2 weeks then discontinued after vial was lost. Tesamorelin attempted for 3 days but discontinued due to needle anxiety. Also supplemented with Creatine, natural Test boosters, D3K2, and sleep supplements. Diet: aimed for 1200 kcal and 120g protein daily but averaged ~80g protein. Food consisted primarily of lean meats, rice, and fruits. Training: 3x per week lifting, 1-2x per week cardio (walking and HIIT). No TRT used. Self-rated training adherence 7/10, diet adherence 6/10, sleep quality 4/10.
